metadata.title: SHAPE America PE Standards 6-12
metadata.notes: Curated from SHAPE America National Standards for K-12 Physical Education (2024 revision).

nodes.title: Motor competency (Secondary)
nodes.description: Demonstrate competency in a variety of motor skills and movement patterns

academic_standards.description: Demonstrate competency in a variety of motor skills and movement patterns

nodes.title: Movement concepts (Secondary)
nodes.description: Apply knowledge of concepts, principles, strategies, and tactics related to movement and performance

academic_standards.description: Apply knowledge of concepts, principles, strategies, and tactics related to movement and performance

nodes.title: Physical activity (Secondary)
nodes.description: Demonstrate the knowledge and skills to achieve and maintain a health-enhancing level of physical activity and fitness

academic_standards.description: Demonstrate the knowledge and skills to achieve and maintain a health-enhancing level of physical activity and fitness

nodes.title: Responsible behavior (Secondary)
nodes.description: Exhibit responsible personal and social behavior that respects self and others in physical activity settings

academic_standards.description: Exhibit responsible personal and social behavior that respects self and others in physical activity settings

nodes.title: Value of activity (Secondary)
nodes.description: Recognize the value of physical activity for health, enjoyment, challenge, self-expression, and social interaction

academic_standards.description: Recognize the value of physical activity for health, enjoyment, challenge, self-expression, and social interaction
